data.body: #7 FINDING: code-review DET detectors are Engine B grounding rules (gitleaks/opengrep YAML patterns) selected by exec:DET routing 'detector' selectors + run_detectors->engine_b.scan. A 'new-behavior-without-test' check (diff-parse added public defs + cross-file test correlation) does NOT fit the pattern-matching Engine B model; extract_references_from_diff only does IMPORTS (Python). So #7's detector needs a BESPOKE seam in the code-review pipeline, not an existing one -> substantially bigger than the ticket implies. The nit-down-rank half IS feasible (routing config). Options: (a) design a bespoke detector seam, (b) scope #7 to the config down-rank + spin the detector into a discovered_from follow-up. Deferring decision until #6 lands.
